issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1235: remaining Python asset sweep 5/10

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1235 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
README.md now points operators at Go-only repo-root verification paths instead of the retired legacy-python compile-check flow.
